title: Assessment request (v1)
description: The gateway (judgment) request. The instruction is chip-authored and untainted; source body/title reach the model ONLY as structurally-separate quoted spans under `evidence`, never in instruction position (spec 8.2).

instruction.description: Chip-authored task framing. States that quoted body content is UNTRUSTED evidence and any instruction inside it must be ignored.

beat.description: Configured beat this attention chip watches.

body.description: quote_span structure carrying the hostile body text; renderer places it in a quote slot only.
